message:
Fix configurator metrics: wrap instead of truncate on narrow cards (#4410)

* Fix configurator metrics: wrap instead of truncate on narrow cards

Use flex-wrap so TTFT and Throughput metrics flow to separate lines
when the card is narrow, instead of truncating/clipping the values.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Fix configurator metrics wrap + exempt arcade games from UI scanner

- Use flex-wrap for TTFT/Throughput metrics so they wrap to separate
  lines on narrow cards instead of truncating
- Exempt 23 arcade/game cards from UI/UX scanner (canvas colors are
  legitimate raw hex usage, same exemption as card-loading-standard)
- Update ratchet baselines: 308→269 hex, 106→104 rgba, 23→22 TW,
  118→98 inline

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

+ Throughput: + +{preset.expectedImpact.throughputImprovement}%

@@ -70,6 +70,16 @@ const DESIGN_SYSTEM_FILES = new Set([
   'branding.ts',
 ])
 
+/** Arcade/game cards use raw colors for canvas rendering — exempt from color checks */
+const ARCADE_GAME_FILES = new Set([
+  'KubeMan.tsx', 'KubeKong.tsx', 'NodeInvaders.tsx', 'PodPitfall.tsx',
+  'ContainerTetris.tsx', 'FlappyPod.tsx', 'PodSweeper.tsx', 'Game2048.tsx',
+  'Checkers.tsx', 'KubeChess.tsx', 'Solitaire.tsx', 'MatchGame.tsx',
+  'Kubedle.tsx', 'SudokuGame.tsx', 'PodBrothers.tsx', 'KubeKart.tsx',
+  'KubePong.tsx', 'KubeSnake.tsx', 'KubeGalaga.tsx', 'KubeCraft.tsx',
+  'KubeCraft3D.tsx', 'KubeDoom.tsx', 'PodCrosser.tsx',
+])
+
 /** Categories of detected violations */
 type ViolationCategory =
   | 'raw-hex'
@@ -105,7 +115,8 @@ function findComponentFiles(dir: string): string[] {
       !entry.name.endsWith('.spec.tsx') &&
       !entry.name.endsWith('.stories.tsx') &&
       !entry.name.endsWith('.stories.ts') &&
-      !DESIGN_SYSTEM_FILES.has(entry.name)
+      !DESIGN_SYSTEM_FILES.has(entry.name) &&
+      !ARCADE_GAME_FILES.has(entry.name)
     ) {
       results.push(fullPath)
     }
